name: neo-mcp
description: Submit AI/ML engineering tasks to Neo, monitor execution, retrieve outputs, and manage third-party credentials — all from your editor.
long_description: Neo is an autonomous AI engineer for ML, LLM, GenAI and data workflows. This MCP server lets an assistant submit tasks to Neo, poll their status, stream back results, control task lifecycle (pause/resume/stop), and register third-party credentials (GitHub, HuggingFace, Anthropic, OpenRouter, OpenAI, AWS S3, Weights & Biases, Kaggle) so Neo tasks inherit them automatically. A local daemon writes the resulting code, models, metrics, and reports straight into your repo — execution happens on your machine.

neo_secret_key.title: Neo Secret Key
neo_secret_key.description: Your Neo API secret key (starts with sk-v1-). Get one at https://heyneo.com.

workspace_directory.title: Workspace Directory
workspace_directory.description: Project root where Neo reads and writes files. Pick your git/project root — not a subdirectory, and not your home folder.

tools.name: neo_submit_task
tools.description: Submit an AI/ML engineering task to Neo

tools.name: neo_task_status
tools.description: Check the status of a running task

tools.name: neo_get_messages
tools.description: Retrieve messages and output from a task

tools.name: neo_send_feedback
tools.description: Send feedback or a follow-up to a running task

tools.name: neo_stop_task
tools.description: Stop and clean up a task

tools.name: neo_test_integration
tools.description: Test a stored credential against its provider
